theme_strategy.description: Objective, rigid, and functional. Calm density optimized for document reading and AI augmentation. High-contrast monochromatic base with highly distinct accent colors.
theme_strategy.mode: Both Light and Dark Mode Supported

typography.instructions: NEVER use Inter for headings. Use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight) for large headings. Use font-light or font-black, avoiding generic bold.

layouts.overall_structure: 100vh Unified Application Workspace. No global scrolling. Split-screen architecture using react-resizable-panels.
layouts.sidebar: Left panel, 260px-300px wide. Houses 'PDF Library' (drag-drop, folders) and 'Chat History'. Dense layout, gap-1 or gap-2.
layouts.main_workspace: Split-screen. Left: PDF Viewer. Right: AI Chat Panel.
layouts.chat_panel: Streaming-first layout. Messages should use block layouts with step-trace accordions for AI reasoning.
layouts.spacing: Tight (p-2, p-4) in sidebars and toolbars. Generous (p-8, p-12) in the PDF reading area.

grids.rules: Utilize grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4. Every pixel utilized with full height stretching. No jagged bottoms in sidebars.

visual_enhancers.surfaces: Grid Borders: expose the skeleton of the workspace with 1px subtle borders (border-r, border-b) separating panels. Use Flat Solid surfaces, no glassmorphism in reading areas.
visual_enhancers.citations: Interactive chips inside text (e.g., [Page 4]). Must have clear hover states with contrast change. Click triggers scroll+highlight in PDF viewer.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Minimal. Rely on 1px borders instead of drop shadows to maintain the Swiss aesthetic.

motion.animations: Typewriter effect for AI streaming. Smooth accordion for AI 'thinking' traces. Staggered list entrance for PDF files.
motion.interactions: Hover states must explicitly alter text or bg color. Clicking citations smoothly scrolls PDF viewer.

accessibility.contrast: Minimum 4.5:1 for normal text. Avoid pure black/white.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='pdf-upload-zone').

image_urls.description: Cardboard folder by a window, use for 'No PDFs uploaded yet' empty state in the library/workspace.
Professional user avatar for the bottom of the sidebar profile section.

3d_libraries.reasoning: A highly functional PDF/Document reading tool requires 2D clarity over 3D immersion.

components.instructions: Collapsible file explorer tree with drag-and-drop zones. Include 'New Chat' button.
Use react-resizable-panels for Split-screen: PDFViewer on left, ChatPanel on right.
Input field locked to bottom. Message history above. Implement citation chips as clickable inline buttons.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the application using standard React (.js/.jsx) with TailwindCSS. Do not use TypeScript.
Implement the layout with react-resizable-panels to achieve the 2026 AI workspace split-screen standard.
Use sonner for all toast notifications (uploading, success, errors).
Ensure dark mode toggle is present in the sidebar/header.
Ensure the PDF viewer allows highlighting text spans when a citation in the chat is clicked.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do NOT apply universal transition (transition: all). This breaks transforms. Use specific transitions.
Do NOT center align the app container in CSS (no text-align: center on body or .App).
Always use modern button styles (max 4px border radius for this Swiss theme, not full pill).
NEVER use AI assistant emojis (robot, brain, lightbulb) for icons. Use lucide-react icons strictly.
Use 2-3x more spacing in the reading/chat views, but keep file lists dense.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
Do NOT use complete transparent backgrounds for any container with text (headers, dropdowns). ALWAYS use solid or heavily blurred glassmorphism.
